scripts.build: tsc && vite build && BUILD_BACKGROUND=true vite build && node scripts/copy-extension-files.js
scripts.test:e2e: npm run build && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts
scripts.test:e2e:ui: npm run build && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --ui
scripts.test:e2e:debug: npm run build && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --debug
scripts.test:e2e:headed: npm run build && playwright test --config tests/e2e/playwright.config.ts --headed
